studies.title: COVID Vaccine Intentions
studies.series_hypothesis: Pew annually benchmarks vaccine uptake and attitudes post-pandemic rollout

studies.title: Views on improving democracy
studies.series_hypothesis: Pew follows up satisfaction measures with open/closed items on democratic reforms to track evolving priorities
studies.notes: Same 2024 Global Attitudes wave as satisfaction study (24 countries); verbatim in survey topline/PDF; suitable for forward US/international institutional trust benchmarks

studies.title: Dissatisfaction with democracy in high-income nations
studies.series_hypothesis: Pew tracks satisfaction trends in advanced democracies annually to monitor political trust amid elections and economic shifts

extractable_items.question_text_verbatim: How satisfied are you with the way democracy is working in our country?
extractable_items.response_options_verbatim: Very satisfied, Somewhat satisfied, Somewhat dissatisfied, Very dissatisfied

studies.notes: Verified consistent wording across 2017-2025 waves in 12 high-income countries including US; 2025 survey spring data with topline trends; methodology from 2023/24 Global Attitudes Survey matches series

studies.title: Economic Ratings and Issues
studies.series_hypothesis: Pew repeats economy pocketbook questions in pre-election issue priority polls

extractable_items.question_text_verbatim: What do you think is the most important problem facing the country today?
extractable_items.response_options_verbatim: Open-ended; top codes include economy, inflation

studies.notes: 2024 election cycle survey; verbatim in topline PDF appendix at methodology link. Expect similar in 2026 midterm tracking.

studies.title: 2024 Election News Consumption & Trust

extractable_items.response_options_verbatim: Better off, Worse off, About the same

extractable_items.question_text_verbatim: How much of a problem do you think rising prices for food and consumer goods are in the country today?

studies.notes: Verbatim from Feb 2024 short read; ATP survey. Series likely repeats summer 2025/2026 for pocketbook lens.
